chain.thought: Explanation: The dagger symbol (†) indicates the team were champions. After 1995, the years with † are 1996, 1999, 2002, 2007, 2009, 2010, 2011, and 2013. Counting these yields 8 years.

judge_thought: Explanation: The † symbol indicates that the team were champions. Considering years after 1995 (i.e., 1996 onward), the years marked with † are: 1996 (Green Bay Packers), 1999 (St. Louis Rams), 2002 (Tampa Bay Buccaneers), 2007 (New York Giants), 2009 (New Orleans Saints), 2010 (Green Bay Packers), 2011 (New York Giants), and 2013 (Seattle Seahawks). That is 8 years.
